title: Shares of Wynn Resorts jumped 12% on Monday: what happened?
text: Shares of Wynn Resorts Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) are up more than 10% this morning after Tilman Fertitta revealed to have built a sizable stake in the high-end hotels and casinos operator. Fertitta bought 6.9 million shares of Wynn Resorts The billionaire founder of Landry's Inc now owns 6.1% of the Nasdaq-listed firm.

title: Houston Rockets Owner Reveals 6% Stake in WYNN Stock
text: Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ: WYNN ) stock is up by more than 10% today after Houston Rockets owner and billionaire Tilman Fertitta disclosed a 6.1% passive stake in WYNN stock — equivalent to 6.91 million shares — through a 13G filing. A passive stake means that the shareholder will not be actively involved with company decisions.

title: Las Vegas Sands and Wynn Are Falling. Xi's Third Term Makes Investors Fold.
text: President Xi Jinping of China cemented his power with a third term this weekend. Gaming investors don't think this bodes well for gaming in Macau.

title: Why Travel Stocks Tanked Today
text: A combination of negative factors hit travel stocks hard today.

title: Casino Stocks Plunge as Chinese Stay Home for Holiday Week
text: China recorded 422 million domestic trips during the Golden Week holiday, which was 39% lower than the 2019 level and 18.2% less than the same period in 2021.

title: Wynn stock suffers biggest selloff in 2 1/2 years after new COVID lockdowns in China
text: Shares of Wynn Resorts Lt. WYNN, -11.44% tumbled 11.6% in afternoon trading Monday, enough to pace the S&P 500's SPX, -0.48% losers, after some cities in China started imposing new COVID-related lockdowns.

title: WYNN LAS VEGAS ANNOUNCES AWAKENING, AN UNPARALLELED NEW SHOW EXPERIENCE
text: Debuting November 7, Tickets Are On Sale Now LAS VEGAS , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Wynn Las Vegas introduces a new era of entertainment when the resort premieres Awakening on Nov. 7, 2022. An unprecedented spectacle, Awakening immerses audiences in a custom-designed 360-degree theater, the Awakening Theater.
